understanding.goal_understanding: Navigate the character across the tile grid to reach the goal gem (+) within the turn/attempt limits, avoiding hazards like spikes (u/v) that cause an immediate loss.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a horizontal move (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT) or an interaction (CLICK) or UNDO. After any horizontal move, gravity automatically pulls the character in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile (o/m/w or other blocking tiles), hit a hazard (u/v), or reach the goal (+). CLICK targets a specific coordinate [x, y] to remove breakable/clickable blocks (x), which can open or change fall paths; clicks do not move the character unless removing a block causes gravity to immediately pull them to a new landing. UNDO reverts the previous action to recover from a bad move or click.
